member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortRMALogger.PrimeSortRMALoggerTestMethod
member.summary: The PrimeSortRMALoggerTestMethod class is a test method designed to log Readable Memory Address (RMA) data to ITUFF based on the specified capture mode.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortRMALogger.PrimeSortRMALoggerTestMethod.RMALoggerMode
member.summary: Display RMA (Readable Memory Address) on ITUFF.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortRMALogger.PrimeSortRMALoggerTestMethod.RMALogger
member.summary: Gets or sets RMA Logger capture mode. If DISABLED (default), no RMA data will be printed to the ITUFF.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortRMALogger.PrimeSortRMALoggerTestMethod.RMATupleMapping
member.summary: Gets or sets the mapping for extracting a pattern's tuple.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortRMALogger.PrimeSortRMALoggerTestMethod.Execute
member.summary: Check the capture mode and, if enabled, retrieves failure data from the functional test, organizes it by pattern, and writes the results to ITUFF.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortRMALogger.PrimeSortRMALoggerTestMethod.PatternToTuple(System.String)
member.summary: Takes a pattern name and returns the tuple using the stored tuple mapping.
member.param: The full name of a pattern.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortRMALogger.PrimeSortRMALoggerTestMethod.PrintToItuff(System.String)
member.summary: Prints the input to the ITUFF.
